name: triads-key-spelling
note: S-TRIADS-SPELLING (operator UAT 2026-07-10): the Triads & Inversions page spells chord/note names by FUNCTION inside the stated key (regime B) - F major's IV reads Bb, never A#. Asserts by shape (any displayed A# in an F-major cycle is a failure), so it survives copy changes.

steps.label: F major heading names IV as Bb
no A# anywhere in the rendered F-major cycle
triad note prose spells Bb (fretboard names in key)
